pages.image_tooltip: A highly active Cretaceous crocodilian, its namesake reflects the gnarly tusk-like teeth crowding its maw, and its likely nasty temper. Alongside this, the unusual, powerful legs of Kaprosuchus are built to propel it directly into your view, with its jaws clamped firmly around your head

pages.clone.clone_tooltip: Egg must be placed down to hatch
pages.feature_1.tooltip: Kaprosuchus can be loyal companions despite their gnarly exteriors - tame them using §aBones§7
pages.feature_2.tooltip: Kaprosuchus is capable of bombastic leaps that carry them far and high in the air, escape is no easy task
